title: Vajreshwari Temple
tagline: Vajreshwari Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Shree Vajreshwari Yogini Devi Mandir is a Hindu temple dedicated to the goddess Vajreshwari, located in the town Vajreshwari, 75 km away from Mumbai.
overview.description: The Shree Vajreshwari Yogini Devi Mandir is a Hindu temple dedicated to the goddess Vajreshwari, located in the town Vajreshwari, 75 km away from Mumbai. The town, earlier known as Vadvali, was renamed Vajreshwari in honour of the presiding deity of the temple.

topPlaces.name: Vajreshwari
topPlaces.description: Vajreshwari (also known as Vajrabai) is a village situated near the Tansa River in the Bhiwandi taluk of Thane district, Maharashtra, India. It is famous for the Vajreshwari Temple and hot water springs.

topPlaces.name: Nimbavali
topPlaces.description: Nimbavali is a village in the Palghar district of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the wada taluka.

topPlaces.name: Saiwan
topPlaces.description: Saiwan is a village in the Palghar district of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Vasai taluka.

topPlaces.name: Umbar Pada Nandade
topPlaces.description: Umbar Pada Nandade is a census town in Thane district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Saparonde
topPlaces.description: Saparonde is a village in Vada Taluka of Palghar District, in the state of Maharashtra, India.

items.note: Vajreshwari (also known as Vajrabai) is a village situated near the Tansa River in the Bhiwandi taluk of Thane district, Maharashtra, India. It is famous for the Vajreshwari Temple and hot water springs.
Nimbavali is a village in the Palghar district of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the wada taluka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vajreshwari Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vajreshwari Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vajreshwari Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (30 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vajreshwari Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vajreshwari Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vajreshwari Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vajreshwari Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vajreshwari Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vajreshwari, Nimbavali, Saiwan, Umbar Pada Nandade, Saparonde.
